backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the ONEDOT DIGITAL logo asset replacement was applied to HeroSection, Footer, and TopNav components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each component's purpose, styling, and content.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'One Dot Digital' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout with TopNav, all five content sections, and Footer on a white background.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: About section displaying a company description and three animated value cards (Strategic, Creative, Growth-Focused) with scroll-triggered reveal animations.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section rendering email, phone, and Instagram links as interactive cards alongside a CTA area, with scroll-triggered reveal animations.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Full-screen hero section featuring the ONEDOT DIGITAL logo image, headline, subtext, CTA buttons, parallax background, wavy animation, and a scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Services section rendering a grid of flip cards for each service, showing the title and tagline on the front and description with feature badges on the back.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Renders a testimonials section with a grid of flip cards, each showing a client's name/business on the front and their quote on the back, with scroll-triggered reveal animations.
frontend/src/components/site/FlipCard.ts: A card component that flips on hover to reveal a back side, with a reduced-motion fallback that stacks front and back content vertically.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the logo, quick navigation links, and contact details (email, phone, Instagram), along with a copyright notice and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/site/SectionShel: A reusable section wrapper that applies consistent vertical padding, scroll margin, and a centered container to its children.
frontend/src/components/site/ServiceIcon: Maps a service ID string to a corresponding Lucide icon and renders it inside a styled circular container with hover color transition.
frontend/src/components/site/TopNav.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background blur, desktop nav links, a CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/site/WavyBackgro: Renders three layered animated SVG wave shapes as an absolute background decoration, with animation disabled when the user prefers reduced motion.
frontend/src/content/contact.ts: Exports a single object containing the business contact details: email, phone number, and Instagram URL.
frontend/src/content/services.ts: Exports an array of seven service objects, each with an ID, title, tagline, description, and list of included sub-services.
frontend/src/content/testimonials.ts: Exports an array of five client testimonial objects, each containing an ID, client name, business name, and quote.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor using React Query, returning an anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useInViewReveal.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to toggle a visibility flag when an element scrolls into view, with optional delay and immediate visibility for reduced-motion users.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: Custom hook that returns a scroll-based parallax offset value, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMoti: Custom hook that detects and reactively tracks the user's `prefers-reduced-motion` media query preference.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file; no backend data fetching is needed for this static marketing site.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, brand color utilities, and keyframe animations (flip card, wavy background).
frontend/src/lib/scrollToSection.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by ID with a configurable top offset.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` helper that merges Tailwind class names using `clsx` and `tailwind-merge`.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH brand colors, custom border radii, font family, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the ONEDOT DIGITAL brand site, tracking the current feature to replace the logo image in TopNav, HeroSection, and Footer with a newly generated asset.
